popularStory.headline: Agnes Hungate
popularStory.description:
https://www.thepeerage.com/p59297.htm#i592963
Agnes Hungate was born in 1430.1 She was the daughter of John Hungate and Alice Barrington.1 She married Sir John Sulyard in 1453.1 She died in 1463.1 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Frances Sulyard於大約1456年出生在英國素福爾可維瑟爾登時，她的父親Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England29歲，母親Agnes Hungate27歲。她於1427年與Edmund Alcock在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1539年4月2日在英國素福爾可巴德利享年84歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可巴德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Frances Sulyard于大约1456年出生在英国素福爾可維瑟爾登时，她的父亲Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England29岁，母亲Agnes Hungate27岁。她于1427年与Edmund Alcock在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1539年4月2日在英国素福爾可巴德利享年84岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可巴德利。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Frances Sulyard was born about 1456, in Wetherden, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England, was 29 and her mother, Agnes Hungate, was 27. She married Edmund Alcock in 1427, in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 2 April 1539, in Badley, Suffolk, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Badley, Suffolk, England.

fr.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Frances Sulyard est née environ 1456, à Wetherden, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hungate, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Alcock en 1427, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1539, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Frances Sulyard um 1456 in Wetherden, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England 29 und ihre Mutter Agnes Hungate 27. Sie hat 1427 in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Edmund Alcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. April 1539 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Badley, Suffolk, England und wurde in Badley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Frances Sulyard è nata il circa 1456 nel Wetherden, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Agnes Hungate, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Alcock nel 1427, nel Badley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 2 aprile 1539, nel Badley, Suffolk, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Badley, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Frances Sulyardが約1456年にイギリススフォルクウエスエルデンで生まれた時，父Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of Englandは29歳，母Agnes Hungateは27歳であった。1427年にイギリスイギリススフォルクバドリーでEdmund Alcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1539年4月2日にイギリススフォルクバドリーで84歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクバドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: 영국 수폴크 켄턴 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Frances Sulyard(이)가 대략 1456년 영국 수폴크 w더든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Hungate(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바들리에서 Edmund Alcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 4월 2일 영국 수폴크 바들리에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 바들리에 묻혔다.

pt.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Frances Sulyard nasceu aproximadamente 1456, em Wetherden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hungate, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Alcock em 1427, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de abril de 1539, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, England

ru.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: алл сеинц' чурч, кэнтон, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Frances Sulyard родилась около 1456 г. в местности ветирден, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hungate, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Alcock в 1427 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 апреля 1539 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Frances Sulyard nació aproximadamente 1456, en Wetherden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes Hungate, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Edmund Alcock en 1427, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 2 de abril de 1539, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
